parameters.query:
SET LOCAL app.current_entity = 'all';

-- Application-level idempotency: events.idempotency_key has no DB unique
-- constraint (partitioned tables can't UNIQUE-index a non-partition-key
-- column without including created_at), so we WHERE NOT EXISTS instead of
-- ON CONFLICT. Pipeline 11 fires once per month from a single trigger so
-- TOCTOU risk between SELECT and INSERT is negligible.
WITH new_event AS (
  INSERT INTO events
    (event_type, source, entity_id, payload, payload_signature,
     status, idempotency_key, pipeline_version)
  SELECT '{{ $json.event_type }}',
         '{{ $json.source }}',
         NULL,
         $pl${{ $json.payload_json }}$pl$::jsonb,
         '{{ $json.payload_signature }}',
         'done',
         '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}',
         '{{ $json.pipeline_version }}'
   WHERE NOT EXISTS (
     SELECT 1 FROM events
      WHERE idempotency_key = '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}'
   )
  RETURNING id, trace_id
),
audit AS (
  INSERT INTO audit_log
    (pipeline, event_id, trace_id, action, record_type, record_id,
     pipeline_version, result)
  SELECT 'partition_maintenance',
         ne.id,
         ne.trace_id,
         CASE WHEN {{ $json.was_created }} THEN 'partition_created'
                                            ELSE 'partition_already_existed' END,
         'event_partition',
         NULL,
         '{{ $json.pipeline_version }}',
         'success'
    FROM new_event ne
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT (SELECT id FROM new_event) AS event_id,
       (SELECT id FROM audit) AS audit_id,
       '{{ $json.partition_name }}' AS partition_name,
       {{ $json.was_created }} AS was_created;
